SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Nov-13-2024 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff/Respondent Gilberta M. Ramos appeared.
Defendant/Appellant Rosalinda Munoz appeared.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo.

Plaintiff/Respondent Gilberta M. Ramos sworn and testified on her own behalf.
Defendant/Appellant Rosalinda Munoz sworn and testified on his own behalf.
Witness Virginia Munoz sworn and testified on behalf of Defendant/Appellant Rosalinda Munoz.

The following documentary evidence is introduced and admitted:
Plaintiff/Respondent's Group Exhibit.
Defendant/Appellant's Group Exhibit.
Appellant's and Respondent's exhibits are retained.

The matter is taken under submission.
Judge: Curtis Karnow, Clerk: A. Mok. Not reported. (611)
